offer: For restaurant managers processing 20–50 sales transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
problem: manual reconciliation of sales data leads to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
